news_items.headline: Yankees fight back late to beat Guardians, 7-5, in extra innings
news_items.summary: The Yankees gave up an early lead, but fought back to beat the Cleveland Guardians, 7-5, in 10 innings on Monday night.

news_items.headline: Jays Lose To Phillies
news_items.summary: Phillies 5 Blue Jays 2 We knew this was going to be a tough one. Cristopher Sánchez came into the game with a 1.46 ERA and he’s allowed just 1 run in his last 5 starts, covering 38 innings. The most earned runs he’s given up in a game was 2 and, well, we got […]

news_items.headline: Mariners place shortstop J.P. Crawford on injured list with right hand contusion
news_items.summary: Detroit starter Framber Valdez hit Crawford in the third inning of Friday’s game, and the 31-year-old missed the final two games of the series against the Tigers.
